name: PROJ-2024-001 — LifeTech Pharma: Detection Gaps (Oct–Nov 2024)
description: ATT&CK technique coverage for PROJ-2024-001 LifeTech Pharma intrusion. Red = rule missing (no detection). Orange = coverage incomplete (partial / mis-tuned). Yellow = data source missing (infra change required). Green = rule fired.

techniques.comment: Phishing attachment (CFO .xlsm). M365 ATP delivered (SCL=4, threshold=5). ATP partially detected but did not block. GAP: Coverage incomplete — SCL threshold tuning required.

AiTM proxy attack against IT admin (p.levi). Session token stolen via mfa-lifetechpharma.com phishing page. Azure AD Conditional Access bypassed (notApplied). GAP: Rule missing — no AiTM / impossible-travel / token-replay detection.

VPN access using stolen session token. Istanbul, off-hours (00:17 local), no prior VPN history for this location. Assigned internal IP 10.10.3.22 — activity masquerades as legitimate workstation. GAP: Rule missing — no anomalous VPN geolocation / off-hours auth alert.

svc_backup (Domain Admin) abused for lateral movement to SERVER-RD-02 and DC01, file access (47 formula files), and DCSync. EID 4624 visible in SIEM. Off-hours logon. GAP: Rule missing — service account off-hours logon not alerted on.
Valid domain account (svc_backup) used to blend lateral movement with legitimate backup traffic.

Encoded PowerShell (-Enc) on WS-CFO-01 (OUTLOOK.EXE parent) and WS-IT-LEVI. CrowdStrike detected on CFO host only. Sysmon EID 1 on both hosts. GAP: Coverage incomplete — IT admin host had Sysmon gap (GAP-001, 10 days) and no alert fired.
LSASS memory access on WS-CFO-01. Sysmon EID 10, GrantedAccess 0x1010 (PROCESS_VM_READ + PROCESS_QUERY_INFORMATION). GAP: Rule missing — Sysmon EID 10 not alerted on in SIEM.

DCSync from WS-IT-LEVI (10.10.3.22 — non-DC). svc_backup replicated domain, krbtgt, and Administrator hashes. Golden ticket capability obtained. EID 4662 audit was configured and event reached SIEM — but no alert rule existed. GAP: Rule missing — single SPL rule on EID 4662 from non-DC would have contained this incident.
DCOM lateral movement to SERVER-FIN-01. WmiPrvSE spawning PowerShell observed in CrowdStrike. GAP: Rule missing — WmiPrvSE parent-child alert not deployed.
BITS used to download second-stage payload. Sysmon EID 1 (bitsadmin.exe). GAP: Rule missing — BITS external download not monitored.
WMI used for lateral movement execution. Observed in CrowdStrike log. GAP: Data source missing — WMI execution logging (Microsoft-Windows-WMI-Activity/Operational) not forwarded to SIEM.
Windows event log cleared post-exfil. EID 1102 observed in CrowdStrike. GAP: Rule missing — wevtutil / EID 1102 alert not deployed in SIEM.

Registry Run Key written to HKCU\...\Run\WindowsHostSvc (AppData\Roaming path). Sysmon EID 13 ingested in SIEM. GAP: Coverage incomplete — EID 13 data present but no alert rule on AppData\Roaming persistence paths.

legendItems.label: Rule missing — data in SIEM, no alert (sprint item)
Coverage incomplete — partial detection, tuning required
Data source missing — infra change required before rules can be written
